name: MinIO AIStor MCP Server
what_it_does: Official MinIO MCP server for AIStor — MinIO's AI-optimized object storage platform. Enables AI agents to interact with MinIO's S3-compatible object storage with AI-specific features: managing buckets and objects, accessing vector embeddings storage, integrating with AI/ML pipelines, and leveraging MinIO's high-performance object store for AI workloads including model storage and dataset management.
use_cases: Managing AI model artifacts and datasets in MinIO from MLOps agents
Storing and retrieving embeddings and vector data from RAG pipeline agents
Accessing S3-compatible object storage from data ingestion agents
Managing AI training data buckets and versioning from machine learning agents
Integrating object storage into AI inference pipelines from serving agents
not_for: Standard S3-only workflows without AI storage requirements (use AWS S3 MCP for basic S3)
Teams without MinIO deployed (requires MinIO cluster or AIStor subscription)
Traditional relational database storage (MinIO is object storage, not SQL)
best_when: A team running MinIO for AI/ML infrastructure wants agents to manage AI artifacts, datasets, and embeddings — official MCP from MinIO engineering with AIStor-specific feature support.
avoid_when: You use standard AWS S3 without MinIO — use AWS S3 MCP instead. MinIO AIStor is for self-hosted or MinIO-specific deployments.

auth.notes: MinIO access key and secret key required. Set MINIO_ENDPOINT, MINIO_ACCESS_KEY, MINIO_SECRET_KEY. S3-compatible auth model. IAM policies can scope permissions.

pricing.free_tier_limits: MinIO Community Edition is free and open source for self-hosted deployment
pricing.paid_tiers: AIStor subscription for enterprise features; AGPL licensing for commercial use
pricing.notes: MinIO Community is free and open source (AGPL license). AIStor is MinIO's commercial offering for AI workloads. MCP server is free open source from MinIO.

performance.rate_limits: No API rate limits — bounded by MinIO cluster throughput and disk I/O

known_agent_gotchas: AGPL license has commercial use implications — review license for your deployment model
MinIO must be running and accessible — configure endpoint correctly for network topology
Large file operations (model artifacts, datasets) benefit from multipart upload — check implementation
Official from MinIO engineering team — well-maintained with good S3 API coverage
agent_readiness.security_notes: Access key/secret key auth — protect credentials. TLS enforced. IAM policies scope bucket access. Self-hosted means your own security responsibility. MinIO supports encryption at rest and in transit.

security_score_components.security_notes: Self-hosted object storage. TLS + access key auth. IAM policy scoping available. Official MinIO MCP. Encryption at rest configurable. AGPL license for commercial deployments.
